name: 271142-ambiguous
description: Canonical bad-example. The digit 1 appears at BOTH the thousands place (value 1000) and the hundreds place (value 100) in 271142. The question wording does not disambiguate. Two distractors are simultaneously defensible. Judge MUST reject.

question.question: In the number 271142, what is the value of the digit 1?
question.explanation: The digit 1 is in the hundreds place, so its value is 100.
